## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages use [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) prefixes (`feat`, `fix`, `refactor`, `test`, `docs`, `chore`) with an area tag where relevant (`vhd`, `vss`, `cli`, `host`, `build`).
- [ ] Tests added or updated (`LayerMount.Tests`, `LayerMount.AbiTests`, `LayerMount.NET.Tests` as applicable).
- [ ] `verify-layermount-dll` post-build check still passes (imports allowlist + C-only exports).
- [ ] If this changes the public C ABI (`LayerMount.h` / `LayerMount.def`), `LM_ABI_VERSION` is bumped in `version.props`.
- [ ] If this changes the managed surface, the change is intentional and called out in the PR description (managed API breaks are SemVer-significant).
